welcome.title: Writing Studio
welcome.body: A dockable workspace for this book. Panels (compose, planner, cast, quality…) will be added here one at a time. Drag tabs to split, stack, float, or pop out into their own window.

steering.title: Steering
steering.desc: Author rules that guide AI on this book

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.desc: Entities, search, and bulk actions for this book

glossary-ontology.title: Ontology
glossary-ontology.desc: Kinds, genres & attributes for this book

glossary-unknown.title: Unknown entities
glossary-unknown.desc: Reassign unrecognized entities to a kind

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.desc: Browse and open your knowledge-graph projects

job-detail.title: Job
job-detail.empty: Open a job from the Jobs panel to watch it here.

books.title: Books
books.desc: Browse and read your other books without leaving this studio

book-reader.title: Reader
book-reader.desc: Read a chapter from another book

leaderboard-books.title: Leaderboard: Books
leaderboard-books.desc: Top-ranked books by rating, readers & favorites

json-editor.title: JSON
json-editor.desc: Raw JSON view of a resource

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.desc: Manage plugins, skills, MCP servers, commands & hooks

sceneRail.title: Scenes
sceneRail.empty: No scenes for this chapter (outline it in the composer).
sceneRail.notAnchored: Scene not anchored in the text yet — use ⚓ to link headings.
sceneRail.anchorNoop: {{count}} already anchored, {{unmatched}} without a matching heading.
sceneRail.anchorTitle: Link scenes to their headings in the text
sceneRail.addDisabled: Chapter has no outline yet (create it in the composer)

jsonEditor.empty: Open a resource as JSON from its panel ("Open as JSON").

planner.empty: Paste your novel-system markdown and Propose to start a plan run.

editor.empty: Select a chapter in the manuscript navigator to edit it here.

steering.heading: Steering rules
steering.subheading: Persistent author guidance injected into AI turns for this book.
steering.noBook: Open this panel from a book to author its steering rules.
steering.capReached: Rule limit reached ({{max}}). Delete a rule to add another.
steering.empty: No steering rules yet. Add one to guide the AI on this book.
steering.autoNote: Note: 'auto' currently behaves like 'manual' — it's included only when you reference it by #name. Automatic selection is coming later.

form.name: Name
form.bodyPlaceholder: Write the guidance the AI should follow…

error.duplicate: A rule with this name already exists in this book.
error.cap: That exceeds a limit (body ≤ 8000 chars, name ≤ 200, ≤ 20 rules) or an invalid mode.
error.other: Couldn't save the rule. Please try again.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit steering for this book.

palette.quickOpenHint: Type to search chapters, scenes & arcs

desc.toggleSidebar: Show or hide the side bar

manuscript.title: Manuscript
manuscript.body: Chapters & scenes — the navigator that drives the dock. Built next.

bible.title: Story Bible
bible.body: Cast, world & canon entries. Coming soon.

search.title: Search
search.body: Full-text & semantic search across the book. Coming soon.

quality.title: Quality
quality.body: Critic scores, promise threads & canon issues. Coming soon.

bottomStub.jobs: Background jobs appear here once wired.
bottomStub.generation: Live generation progress appears here once wired.
bottomStub.issues: Quality issues appear here once wired.
